name: Parker, Everette
description: There is nothing in the world like etiquette. Hobby: keeping quiet.
text: There is nothing in the world like etiquette. Hobby: keeping quiet.

name: Hamm, Eunice
description: She possesses a mind that all marvel at. Hobby: taking notes during chapel.
text: She possesses a mind that all marvel at. Hobby: taking notes during chapel.

name: Vandiver, Baxter
description: Said to be a lady killer, but up to this time we have heard of no injuries. Ambition: to catch a chicken.
text: Said to be a lady killer, but up to this time we have heard of no injuries. Ambition: to catch a chicken.

name: Rodgers, Robbie
description: When she speaks it is usually worth hearing. Characteristic: Don't care.
text: When she speaks it is usually worth hearing. Characteristic: Don't care.

name: Charles, Roy
description: I study myself more than any other subject. Hobby, correcting the professors.
text: I study myself more than any other subject. Hobby, correcting the professors.

name: Johnson, Lillian
description: And must I cease to talk? O, cruel fate! Ambition, to be in a moving picture.
text: And must I cease to talk? O, cruel fate! Ambition, to be in a moving picture.

name: Jackson, Norvin
description: He is a perfect lady. Ambition, to be funny.
text: He is a perfect lady. Ambition, to be funny.

name: Young, Hazel
description: She can cook and sew, truly a woman for the house. Ambition, to have her own way.
text: She can cook and sew, truly a woman for the house. Ambition, to have her own way.

name: Rice, Walter
motto: "What's the use to worry?"
description: Ambition: to be a jumping jack.
text:
"What's the use to worry?"
Ambition: to be a jumping jack.

name: Guess, Gertrude
motto: "I am little but I am mighty."
description: Ambition: to get married.
text:
"I am little but I am mighty."
Ambition: to get married.

name: Rankin, Sallie
motto: "Joy go with you, we can't."
description: Married.
text:
"Joy go with you, we can't."
Married.

name: Clark, Roscoe
motto: "A man with hair trigger conscience."
description: Favorite remedy: iodine.
text:
"A man with hair trigger conscience."
Favorite remedy: iodine.

name: Barfoot, Eugene
motto: "Sarcasm poisons reproof. Have a good time today, for tomorrow you may be married."
description: Attainment: looking wise.
text:
"Sarcasm poisons reproof. Have a good time today, for tomorrow you may be married."
Attainment: looking wise.

name: Porter, Grace
motto: "She has a great big soul; it is worth your while to know her."
description: Accomplishment: the only girl in school who plays the violin.
text:
"She has a great big soul; it is worth your while to know her."
Accomplishment: the only girl in school who plays the violin.

name: Vickry, Wayne
motto: "He is a fearless, conscientious youth, and would be more studious if the girls would let him."
description: Ambition: to grow spaghetti.
text:
"He is a fearless, conscientious youth, and would be more studious if the girls would let him."
Ambition: to grow spaghetti.

name: Mcvay, Ruby
motto: "Her bright smile haunts me still."
description: Ambition: to please Tobe.
text:
"Her bright smile haunts me still."
Ambition: to please Tobe.

name: Sherrill, Cassell
motto: "Have all the fun possible at the other fellow's expense."
description: Characteristic: telling yarns.
text:
"Have all the fun possible at the other fellow's expense."
Characteristic: telling yarns.

name: Eschol, Partin
motto: "Never do today what you can put off till tomorrow."
description: Accomplishment: a knowledge of Aggie history.
text:
"Never do today what you can put off till tomorrow."
Accomplishment: a knowledge of Aggie history.

name: Edgar, Reese
motto: "Very quiet chap, he walks about saying nothing."
description: Characteristic: determination.
text:
"Very quiet chap, he walks about saying nothing."
Characteristic: determination.

name: Elizabeth, Reid
motto: "She is a girl whose sum of knowledge can not increase at any college."
description: Ambition: to please her teacher.
text:
"She is a girl whose sum of knowledge can not increase at any college."
Ambition: to please her teacher.

name: Kenneth, Bonham
description: He has a voice which would make a donkey ashamed of itself. Destiny, lost in a windstorm.
text: He has a voice which would make a donkey ashamed of itself. Destiny, lost in a windstorm.

name: Frances, Porter
description: A daughter of the gods, divinely tall, and most divinely fair. Ambition, to be a prima donna.
text: A daughter of the gods, divinely tall, and most divinely fair. Ambition, to be a prima donna.

name: Murl, Cox
description: Good boys who to their books apply will be great men by and by. Accomplishment, well versed in military tactics.
text: Good boys who to their books apply will be great men by and by. Accomplishment, well versed in military tactics.

name: Effie, Collier
description: I thank my stars I am not as other girls are. Destiny, teacher.
text: I thank my stars I am not as other girls are. Destiny, teacher.

name: Weiterer, George
motto: "Get thee behind me, fair maiden."
description: Ambition: to be a scientist.
text:
"Get thee behind me, fair maiden."
Ambition: to be a scientist.

name: Collier, Esther
motto: "There is a gift beyond the reach of all, being eloquently silent."
description: Characteristic: precision.
text:
"There is a gift beyond the reach of all, being eloquently silent."
Characteristic: precision.

name: Davis, W. T.
motto: "Don't study too much, you might learn something."
description: Ambition: to be the proprietor of a hamburger joint.
text:
"Don't study too much, you might learn something."
Ambition: to be the proprietor of a hamburger joint.

name: Barton, Ada
description: Believes in woman's rights and works for the same. Hobby: making pies like mother used to make. Favorite expression: [Missing]
text: Believes in woman's rights and works for the same. Hobby: making pies like mother used to make. Favorite expression: [Missing]

name: Forrest, Widener
description: A boy brimful of college spirit. Has almost lost his voice yelling for the home team. Ambition: to be a mockingbird.
text: A boy brimful of college spirit. Has almost lost his voice yelling for the home team. Ambition: to be a mockingbird.

name: Norma, Adcock
description: Be careful what you say, for she wears her feelings on her sleeve. Hobby: waiting tables.
text: Be careful what you say, for she wears her feelings on her sleeve. Hobby: waiting tables.

name: Roy, Shinn
description: A very modest youth, who is so good-natured that he smiles in his sleep. Hobby: flirting.
text: A very modest youth, who is so good-natured that he smiles in his sleep. Hobby: flirting.

name: Pearl, Carmical
motto: "I am going where diplomas are more easily gotten next year."
description: Ambition: to look like a senior.
text:
"I am going where diplomas are more easily gotten next year."
Ambition: to look like a senior.

name: Delaney, Charles
description: The angels wept in heaven when he was born. Occupation, chasing his shadow.
text: The angels wept in heaven when he was born. Occupation, chasing his shadow.

name: Davis, Imo
description: Such a busy little girl, so full of importance. Ambition, to grow up.
text: Such a busy little girl, so full of importance. Ambition, to grow up.

name: Skelton, Max
description: Looks quiet and harmless, a regular Sunday school boy. Ambition, to be a great soldier.
text: Looks quiet and harmless, a regular Sunday school boy. Ambition, to be a great soldier.

name: Dickie, Mary
description: Baby senior. Quick to see and act. Always to see and act in basketball. Hobby, going with town boys.
text: Baby senior. Quick to see and act. Always to see and act in basketball. Hobby, going with town boys.

name: Wilson, Alsobrook
motto: "When I am gone, wisdom will be no more."
description: Hobby: to be a great orator. It's just like this.
text:
"When I am gone, wisdom will be no more."
Hobby: to be a great orator. It's just like this.

name: Myrtle, Wier
motto: "Who chooseth me choose what many men desire."
description: Destiny: matron in Union depot, Fort Smith.
text:
"Who chooseth me choose what many men desire."
Destiny: matron in Union depot, Fort Smith.

name: Sadie, Haynes
motto: "Her heart is not in her work, it is somewhere else."
description: Hobby: strolling the corridors.
text:
"Her heart is not in her work, it is somewhere else."
Hobby: strolling the corridors.

name: Clyde, Mears
motto: "Awfully cute in spite of the fact that he is a blacksmith."
description: Affliction: bashfulness.
text:
"Awfully cute in spite of the fact that he is a blacksmith."
Affliction: bashfulness.

name: Stephen, Rye
description: Last but slowest, would hurry but afraid he couldn't stop. Ambition, to take a fifteen hour course in nothing.
text: Last but slowest, would hurry but afraid he couldn't stop. Ambition, to take a fifteen hour course in nothing.

name: Ida, Koone
description: I attend to my business and let others do the same. Ambition, to be alone.
text: I attend to my business and let others do the same. Ambition, to be alone.

name: Rowland, Pattillo
description: His wit is only exceeded by his beauty.
text: His wit is only exceeded by his beauty.

name: Roy, Green
description: Who is that that cometh up from the wilderness? Chief occupation, posing.
text: Who is that that cometh up from the wilderness? Chief occupation, posing.
